BackupEntryResponse.description: Summary of a single backup file.
BackupEntryResponse.title: BackupEntryResponse

BackupPathRequest.description: Request body requiring a filesystem path to a backup file.
BackupPathRequest.title: BackupPathRequest

BackupResultResponse.description: Result of a backup create operation.
BackupResultResponse.title: BackupResultResponse

ConfigImportRequest.description:
Request body for POST /config/import.

Uses extra='forbid' per Boundary Input Contract.
ConfigImportRequest.title: ConfigImportRequest

EmailTemplateCreateRequest.description:
Request body for creating a new email template.

Field constraints per §9E.0:
- name: 1–128 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens + underscores
- body_html: 1–65536 chars
- body_format: html or markdown
EmailTemplateCreateRequest.title: EmailTemplateCreateRequest

EmailTemplateUpdateRequest.description:
Request body for updating an existing email template.

Same field constraints as create. All fields optional except name (path key).
EmailTemplateUpdateRequest.title: EmailTemplateUpdateRequest

EmulateRequest.description:
Request body for POST /scheduling/emulator/run.

Accepts full policy JSON and optional phase subset.

phases.description: Optional phase subset: PARSE, VALIDATE, SIMULATE, RENDER
phases.title: Phases

EmulateRequest.title: EmulateRequest

ImportPreviewResponse.description: Import validation result showing key categorization.
ImportPreviewResponse.title: ImportPreviewResponse

PolicyCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating or updating a policy.
PolicyCreateRequest.title: PolicyCreateRequest

PowerEventRequest.description: OS power event from Electron IPC.
PowerEventRequest.title: PowerEventRequest

PreviewRequest.description:
Request body for template preview endpoint.

Optional data dict overrides sample_data_json from the template.
PreviewRequest.title: PreviewRequest

ResolvedSettingResponse.description: Single resolved setting with source attribution.
ResolvedSettingResponse.title: ResolvedSettingResponse

RestoreResultResponse.description: Result of a backup restore operation.
RestoreResultResponse.title: RestoreResultResponse

RunTriggerRequest.description: Request body for triggering a pipeline run.
RunTriggerRequest.title: RunTriggerRequest

SettingResponse.description: Single setting response shape per 04d spec.
SettingResponse.title: SettingResponse

StepResponse.description: Response for a step within a run.
StepResponse.title: StepResponse

UpdateSettingRequest.description: Request body for PUT /settings/{key} — single-key write.
UpdateSettingRequest.title: UpdateSettingRequest

get.description:
List all accounts.

By default, archived and system accounts are excluded.
Returns a bare Account[] array for backward compatibility.

post.description: Create a new account.

delete.description: Delete an account (block-only: fails if trades exist).

get.description: Get a single account (enriched with latest balance + metrics).

List balance history for an account with pagination (P1 wrapper).

Returns paginated response with items + total count.

post.description: Record a balance snapshot for the account.
Soft-delete: set is_archived=True. Trades remain unchanged.
Move all trades to SYSTEM_DEFAULT, then hard-delete the account.
Multi-persona AI trade review. Opt-in with budget cap.

schema.title: Response Ai Review Trade Api V1 Analytics Ai Review Post

get.description: List API keys (masked, never plaintext).

post.description: Create a new API key. Returns raw key exactly once.
Lock database and invalidate sessions.

get.description: Get current auth status.

post.description: Unlock database via envelope-encryption flow.

get.description:
List all backup files, newest first.

Returns file metadata (path, size, modified timestamp).

Source: MEU-74 (06f-gui-settings.md §6f.5)

schema.title: Response List Backups Api V1 Backups Get

post.description:
Create a manual backup of all databases.

Triggers snapshot → encrypt → rotate → verify workflow.

Source: MEU-74 (06f-gui-settings.md §6f.5)

Restore from a backup file.

Detect format → decrypt → verify manifest → stage → swap → migrate.

Source: MEU-74 (06f-gui-settings.md §6f.5)

Non-destructive backup verification.

Opens the backup, validates manifest, verifies file hashes.

Source: MEU-74 (06f-gui-settings.md §6f.5)

Calculate position size based on risk parameters.
Pure calculation — no auth or DB required.

schema.title: Response Calculate Position Api V1 Calculator Position Size Post

get.description:
Export portable (exportable + non-sensitive) settings as JSON.

Returns a config payload with config_version, app_version,
created_at, and settings dict containing only portable key-value pairs.

Source: MEU-75 (06f-gui-settings.md §6f.6)

schema.title: Response Export Config Api V1 Config Export Get

post.description:
Import settings from a config export payload.

With dry_run=true: validates and returns preview (accepted/rejected/unknown)
without persisting any changes.

Without dry_run: validates AND applies accepted keys via bulk_upsert.

Source: MEU-75 (06f-gui-settings.md §6f.6)
Generate a time-limited confirmation token for a destructive action.

get.description:
List round-trips with optional filters.

Canonical query params per 04a-api-trades.md §Round-Trip:
- account_id: filter by account
- status: open | closed | all
- ticker: filter by instrument/ticker
- limit/offset: pagination

post.description:
Receive OS power events from Electron IPC.

On 'resume': force APScheduler to re-evaluate missed firings.
On 'suspend': optionally pause in-flight pipelines.

schema.title: Response Receive Power Event Api V1 Scheduler Power Event Post

get.description:
Return database table/column schemas, DENY_TABLES excluded.

MEU-PH9, AC-19.

schema.title: Response Get Db Schema Api V1 Scheduling Db Schema Get

get.description:
Return sample rows from a table.

Security: allowlist-only approach. Only tables present in sqlite_master
AND not in DENY_TABLES are accepted. Identifiers are quoted.
MEU-PH9, AC-20, F3 (SQL injection hardening).

schema.title: Response Get Db Row Samples Api V1 Scheduling Db Schema Samples  Table  Get

get.description:
Return sample mock data sets per step type for emulator SIMULATE phase.

Used by the ``pipeline://emulator/mock-data`` MCP resource to show AI agents
what synthetic data the emulator produces for each step type.
MEU-PH9, AC-27 (R1 correction).

schema.title: Response Get Emulator Mock Data Api V1 Scheduling Emulator Mock Data Get

post.description:
Run the policy emulator on a JSON policy document.

Returns a structured EmulatorResult with errors, warnings, and mock outputs.
Phase subset execution supported via the ``phases`` field.
Budget enforcement: records response bytes and rate per policy hash.
MEU-PH9, AC-16, F1 (budget enforcement on runtime path).

schema.title: Response Emulator Run Api V1 Scheduling Emulator Run Post

get.description:
Process metrics: PID, uptime, memory, CPU, Python version.
Requires authenticated user.

Bulk read all settings as key-value dict.

Returns all raw user settings. For resolved settings with
source attribution, use GET /settings/resolved.

schema.title: Response Get All Settings Api V1 Settings Get

put.description:
Bulk upsert settings with validation.

Returns 422 if any setting fails validation, with per-key error details.
All-or-nothing: no settings are written if any key fails.
Body: {"key1": "value1", "key2": "value2"}

schema.title: Response Update Settings Api V1 Settings Put

get.description:
Get current email provider config.

AC-E1: has_password is a bool, raw password is never returned.
AC-E5: returns safe defaults when not yet configured (no 500).

put.description:
Save email provider config.

AC-E2: saves all 7 fields.
AC-E3: empty password field keeps existing stored password.

post.description:
Send a test SMTP connection using stored credentials.

AC-E4: returns {success: bool, message: str}.

get.description:
Bulk read all settings with three-tier source attribution.

Returns all known settings resolved through:
user override → app default → hardcoded fallback.
Each entry includes the value source for UI rendering.

Source: MEU-76 (06f-gui-settings.md §6f.7)

schema.title: Response Get Resolved Settings Api V1 Settings Resolved Get

delete.description:
Reset a single setting to its default value.

Removes the user override so the value falls through to
app default → hardcoded fallback.
Returns 204 on success, 404 if key is not in the registry.

Source: MEU-76 (06f-gui-settings.md §6f.7)

get.description:
Read a single setting by key.

Returns the resolved value through three-tier chain:
user override → app default → hardcoded fallback.
Returns 404 if key is not in the settings registry.

put.description:
Upsert a single setting by key.

Body: {"value": <new_value>}
Delegates to bulk_upsert({key: value}) for validation consistency.

Source: MEU-51 prereq (usePersistedState hook contract)

schema.title: Response Update Single Setting Api V1 Settings  Key  Put
